positive: A pattern design featuring abstract, geometric shapes and stylized suns in a retro, mid-century modern style. The color palette is limited to teal, coral, mustard yellow, and dusty rose. The composition should be seamless and highly decorative, suitable for wallpaper or textile print. Style: Mid-Century Modern, vector illustration, clean lines, flat design, graphic novel aesthetic, symmetry, minimalist, repeating pattern.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photorealistic, organic shapes, gradients, noise, dirty, messy
